subcodes.first_line: Praise be befitting and meet unto the Most Great Cause, which hath adorned those dead in the valleys of heedlessness with the ornament of awareness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد سبب اعظم را لایق و سزاست که مردگان وادیهای غفلت را بطراز آگاهی و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @call to action, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
